name: Cheese Mushroom Souffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a frying pan.
2. Add mushrooms and onion, stirring until all liquid evaporates, about 5 minutes.
3. Add seasonings and flour; stir until blended.
4. Gradually stir in milk and sherry. Blend in egg yolks one at a time.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Fold the egg whites into the mushroom mixture until just blended.
7. Fold in about 4/5 of the cheese.
8. Spoon the mixture into buttered individual souffle dishes or a single large souffle dish.
9. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
10. Bake small dishes for 25-30 minutes at 375 degrees.
11. Bake large souffle at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes, or until puffy and golden.
12. Serve immediately.
